string 2:
Thanks for coming. I have... something I can't speak to
my younger siblings about...
{next}Sounds serious.
{next}Am I really the right person for this?
{next}Well, I've got somewhere to be, so...
Yes. It is fairly serious. That's why I called you here.

Actually, you're the only person for this. Just goes to
show how much I trust you, no?

Trying to slink off because you sense trouble?
Well, I won't let you!
So, I happened to hear a little rumor. The word is that...

Another Beelzemon is apparently near the Factorial Area. 
But not the same Beelzemon as before...

We're dealing with the Seven Great Demon Lords, here.
I want to go and see for myself, but...
{next}You're hesitant to do so?
{next}Check? Isn't Beelzemon feeling well?
{next}You mean you wanna go see Beelzemon?

Yes, for various reasons. It's more a matter of whether we
can face the Seven Great Demon Lords and win, is all.

No, I'm fine, but the thought of meeting Beelzemon
face to face is too much for me.

Wouldn't you be concerned if some being that could
destroy the world was lurking around?
I don't have anyone I can talk to...

And so I find myself turning to you for help. You'll go
with me, right?
{next}All right.
{end}I don't feel like it right now.
Thank you...! I knew I was right to turn to you.

Well, let me know when you do feel like it. You're my
only hope, here.

If Apollomon caught wind of this, he'd blow his top
and rush to the attack!

You're the only one I can talk to about this kind of thing.
Now, let's head for Beelzemon!
Damn. I can't even get to half-throttle like this!
Beelzemon...!

You're quite the lucky ones. Normally, I'd gun you down
without a thought, but...

...my guns and bike are out of commission. So you get to
live until I can fix 'em.
{next}I'm picking up on an incredible aura, here.
{next}Why are they out of commission?
{next}Now's our chance to take Beelzemon down!
Heh. How honest. You're funny, kid. I'll kill you last.

My gear can't keep up with the rest of me. One of the
tricky parts of being too strong.

Maybe it is... But it seems your friend there would
prefer a fair fight.

True. Striking while you're unarmed would give us an edge.
But even if we prevail...

...I wouldn't be satisfied with such a victory. It'd
continue to gnaw at me.
Heh... At least one of you has a sense of pride.
...We'll help you repair your guns and bike. And then we'll fight.
{next}You're gonna help Beelzemon power up, Minervamon?
{next}So, how do we repair your things, Beelzemon?
{next}...Attack! Now!

Yes, or else my problem won't be solved. Sorry...
I know I'm being selfish.
Well, well. So you're keen on the idea, too.

The issue isn't that simple. Defeating Beelzemon as
he is now won't solve anything.

Beelzemon, promise you'll fight me once the repairs
are done and you're at full strength.

And, if I win, you'll leave quietly and without incident.
Do we have a deal?

How amusing! Very well. I suppose it'll at least keep
me from getting bored.
I'll send the parts I need for my guns and bike to your Digivice.
Report back to me once you've found everything.

These are some very fine parts, indeed. Once they're in
place, I can fight at 120% power.

And then it would be only polite to face you in battle.
You'll see what I'm capable of!
Incredible...! So this is what we'll be fighting?!

Fighting here won't do. Let's switch to a suitable venue
so that we can give our all.

We can go all out here without fear of collateral damage.
Show me what you've got!

Beelzemon at full strength... I'm not sure this fight is
winnable, but I have no choice!

Is that all you've got? If you ever want a rematch, I could
use the distraction.
Ngh! I'll defeat you next time...!
Do you want to fight Beelzemon at the Paradise Colosseum?
{next}Yes, I want to face off against Beelzemon.
{end}I need to prepare a little more first.
Good! I do, too! And this time, it'll be us who wins!

Yes. Beelzemon doesn't seem to be planning to destroy
the world right now, so we should take time to prepare.

I'll gun you down as many times as it takes to break your
spirit!
I admit my defeat.
We won! We beat Beelzemon!
{next}We did it!
{next}Happy now?
{next}That was fun!
Thanks! And I owe it all to you!

Yes. After seeing my siblings get stronger, it's a relief to
see that I've still got it.
That was your idea of fun...? You really are something else!

I had fun back there. So, as promised, I'll be leaving now.
Farewell.

I feel like a weight has been lifted. I... no longer find
myself simply admiring another.

I wish to continue bettering myself. That's my answer. Here.
This is to thank you.

I like this Paradise Colosseum. No worry of damage, even
with intense battles like that.

Maybe I'll invite everyone else here. After all, this place
is so fun!
Anyway, I'll see you later! Let's make our next duel here!
